arts.ttl: 'Like a kid': Enzo Maresca shares which Chelsea player is always the first outside with a football in training
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca has explained that one first-team player is always the first in training sessions with a football at his feet. So far,...

arts.ttl: New legal row threatens to erupt as Leicester City claim made
arts.sum: Sources close to the Black Country club were surprised to be listed as a potential backer of City, given they supported the Premier League when the four-in-a-row champions first launched its legal challenge against the APT rules earlier this year. The Premier League has consulted its clubs for more than a month on APT rule changes since an arbitration tribunal found aspects of them unlawful following City’s challenge.

arts.ttl: Watford set to lose starlet in Chelsea transfer swoop
arts.sum: Watford prospect Mathis Eboue is set to complete a move to Chelsea, according to reputable youth football source… The post Watford set to lose starlet in Chelsea transfer swoop appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Defender set for surprise Leicester City return in January
arts.sum: Leicester City are struggling to settle in the Premier League this season after winning promotion last season under the leadership of manager Enzo Maresca. The Italian manager left the club to take on a new challenge at Chelsea and since then, the Foxes have failed to have the same impact and their poor form this […] The post Defender set for surprise Leicester City return in January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chilwell fuels Chelsea exit rumours with social media activity
arts.sum: Ben Chilwell has intensified rumours of a Chelsea exit during the January transfer window with his latest social media activity. The former England international has made just one appearance under Enzo Maresca so far this season, and he is expected to leave Stamford Bridge in January following his lack of involvement in 2024-25.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea set to offer their lowest-paid regular starter a big pay rise
arts.sum: How Chelsea are managing the contracts of their first team players has been nothing short of fascinating since the new ownership took over the club....

arts.ttl: Chelsea reporters' XIs vs Leicester as Noni Madueke dropped for Jadon Sancho
arts.sum: Bobby's preferred XI : Sanchez; Gusto, Fofana, Colwill, Cucurella; Lavia, Caicedo; Neto, Palmer, Sancho; Jackson. Fofana and Levi Colwill have formed a decent partnership at centre-back and that should continue at Leicester, given the pair are fit enough to start as both pulled out of international duty with injury last week.

arts.ttl: Premier League clubs approve APT rule changes in blow to Manchester City
arts.sum: Associated party transaction changes approved by 16-4 Aston Villa, Newcastle, Nottingham Forest side with City Premier League clubs approved changes to associated party transaction (APT) rules on Friday in the face of opposition led by Manchester City. The alterations were swiftly approved by 16 votes to four, with Aston Villa, Newcastle and Nottingham Forest standing with City. Clubs were asked at a shareholder meeting in central London to pass modest changes to rules relating to deals when they generate income from sources related to their ownership. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Reece James breaks silence on latest Chelsea injury setback
arts.sum: Chelsea captain Reece James has sent a message after suffering another injury blow. It has now been confirmed that James will be on the sidelines for the game against Leicester on Saturday after Maresca stated that the 24-year-old suffered the injury during training over the international break.

arts.ttl: Report: Champions League club escalate interest in signing 'fantastic' Chelsea youngster
